creator: mpp@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is a 2.0.5 PR concerning his system not detecting COM2, 
which I have personally had work in post 2.0.5 releases with 
no problems.  I have not received any response from the originator to 
multiple mail messages for over a month, so due to the lack of  
additional information, I am closing this PR.
